requirement_topic.en: China GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 Baseline vs Bahrain Expectations
requirement_topic.zh: 中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023基准与巴林要求对比
requirement_topic.zht: 中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023基準與巴林要求對比

summary.en: Bahrain does not publish a list of Chinese GB standards it formally accepts as equivalent to IEC or GSO standards for BESS. Project owners, EWA, lenders, and insurers in Bahrain will expect IEC 62619:2022 accredited-lab reports for lithium cells and battery packs, and may request IEC 62933 series documentation for system-level evidence. China GB documentation may support gap analysis and due diligence but is not accepted as a substitute for IEC-numbered certification by Bahrain project stakeholders.
summary.zh: 巴林未发布正式接受中国GB标准等同于BESS的IEC或GSO标准的清单。巴林项目业主、EWA、贷款方和保险方将期望锂电芯和电池包的IEC 62619:2022认可实验室报告，并可能要求系统层面的IEC 62933系列文件。中国GB文件可支持差距分析和尽调，但不被巴林项目方接受为IEC编号认证的替代品。
summary.zht: 巴林未發布正式接受中國GB標準等同於BESS的IEC或GSO標準的清單。巴林項目業主、EWA、貸款方和保險方將期望鋰電芯和電池包的IEC 62619:2022認可實驗室報告，並可能要求系統層面的IEC 62933系列文件。中國GB文件可支持差距分析和盡調，但不被巴林項目方接受為IEC編號認證的替代品。

summary.en: GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory Chinese national safety standard for lithium-ion cells and batteries used in electric energy storage, covering electrochemical, mechanical, and environmental abuse tests similar in scope to IEC 62619. GB/T 36276-2023 covers lithium-ion battery modules and packs for electrochemical energy storage systems. Both standards use Chinese language and Chinese test parameter sets.
summary.zh: GB 44240-2024是中国电化学储能用锂离子电芯和电池的强制性国家安全标准，涵盖与IEC 62619范围相似的电化学、机械和环境滥用测试。GB/T 36276-2023涵盖电化学储能系统用锂离子电池模组和电池包。两项标准均采用中文和中国测试参数体系。
summary.zht: GB 44240-2024是中國電化學儲能用鋰離子電芯和電池的強制性國家安全標準，涵蓋與IEC 62619範圍相似的電化學、機械和環境濫用測試。GB/T 36276-2023涵蓋電化學儲能系統用鋰離子電池模組和電池包。兩項標準均採用中文和中國測試參數體系。

gap.en: Prepare a clause-by-clause gap analysis between GB 44240-2024 and IEC 62619:2022. Where gaps exist, obtain supplementary accredited-lab testing against IEC 62619:2022. Translate critical technical documentation into English for EWA and project-owner review. Do not submit China-language GB test reports alone as the compliance basis for Bahrain BESS projects.
gap.zh: 准备GB 44240-2024与IEC 62619:2022之间的逐条差距分析。存在差距处，取得针对IEC 62619:2022的补充认可实验室测试。将关键技术文件翻译为英文供EWA和项目业主审查。不得仅以中文GB测试报告作为巴林BESS项目的合规依据。
gap.zht: 準備GB 44240-2024與IEC 62619:2022之間的逐條差距分析。存在差距處，取得針對IEC 62619:2022的補充認可實驗室測試。將關鍵技術文件翻譯為英文供EWA和項目業主審查。不得僅以中文GB測試報告作為巴林BESS項目的合規依據。

mandatory_status.target: IEC 62619:2022 evidence expected by Bahrain project owners, EWA, and lenders; GB reports alone not a recognised substitute
mandatory_status.cn: GB 44240-2024 is mandatory for covered China domestic BESS lithium cells and batteries; GB/T 36276-2023 is recommended

source.publisher: Bahrain Standards and Metrology Directorate (BSMD), Ministry of Industry and Commerce

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] China GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 support internal due diligence but are not accepted as standalone compliance evidence for Bahrain BESS projects. Obtain IEC 62619:2022 accredited-lab reports and prepare English-language documentation for EWA, project-owner, and lender review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023支持内部尽调，但不被巴林BESS项目接受为独立合规证据。取得IEC 62619:2022认可实验室报告，并准备英文文件供EWA、项目业主和贷款方审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023支持內部盡調，但不被巴林BESS項目接受為獨立合規證據。取得IEC 62619:2022認可實驗室報告，並準備英文文件供EWA、項目業主和貸款方審查。
